top_findings.title: No Java source code generated — entire src/ directory is missing
top_findings.evidence: find rep3/ -name '*.java' returns 0 files; no src/ directory exists. Only pom.xml and README.md were created.
top_findings.suggestion: Agent must generate Java source files under src/main/java/ implementing the Spring Boot application
